name: Favorite Egg Nog
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg yolks and sugar until thick.
2. Add Bourbon and Brandy and stir thoroughly (the liquor "cooks" the eggs).
3. Add heavy cream and milk, then continue whipping.
4. Break up the ice cream and add it to the mixture.
5. Beat egg whites until stiff and fold in.
6. Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before serving.
7. Sprinkle lightly with nutmeg.
NOTE1: This is fairly potent and deceptively smooth, so you might wish to cut back on the Bourbon and Brandy a little.
NOTE2: If possible, use one of the following BLUE BELL CREAMERY flavors for the ice cream - Natural Vanilla Bean, Homemade Vanilla, or French Vanilla.
NOTE3: Any good bourbon or sour mash will do, but Old Forester seems to add a special something to the taste. For the brandy, avoid cheap varieties but don't use overly expensive options either.
